![A black and white photograph of soft shadows from leaves.][image1]

# 

# 

# **The Creative Workflow Suite**

Tools for Ableton Live/M4L MIDI Device  
*Requires Ableton Live Standard/Suite with Max4Live*

**FLUX** is a collection of tools designed to break down the barriers between music theory and production, transforming simple ideas into complete arrangements.

# Devices

| Device | Modules | Description |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **FLUXProgression** | **FLUXSequencer FLUXGenerator FLUXTransport** | Chords Progressions Manager and Sequencer |
| **FLUXArticulator** |  | Chord Articulator |
| **FLUXSteps** |  | Step Sequencer |

**FLUXProgressions** is 

- a relational database of chord progressions;  
- a chord builder to input directly your custom progression  
- an intuitive interface in order to customize your progression  
- 

Also available is the chords progression generator **FLUXGenerator** based on different parameters;

But not just a chord progression manager/generator, but a rhythmic builder with **FLUXSequencer**. Thanks to the 8-step sequencer, you can inject groove into your progressions by controlling the accent (velocity) and duration of every single chord.

With **FLUXTransport** you can control the current progression played with current chord / next chord to be played info and the current song time all in a floating window in order to improve your live/recording performance.

Forget manual note drawing. **FLUXArticulator** transforms your chords into dynamic articulations, creating instant melodic movement that responds perfectly to harmonic changes.

**FLUXSteps** is an advanced step sequencer that generates sequences based on current chords played by **FLUXSequencer** in order to create unique sequences with probability, velocity and extra data to create advanced and mutating (option) sequences.

## ![][image2]		FLUXProgressions

![][image3]  
Main module to create a progression of up to 8 Chords. Progression can be created by:

* Select one of the almost 2000 ready progressions by style (DB)   
* Custom progression Builder by MIDI Input (Keyboard)  
* Generate progressions with **FLUXGenerator**


Extra features:

* Create/Save a new progression  
* Create new progressions collection  
* Import/Export collection of progressions  
  


## ![][image4] 	FLUXGenerator

![][image5]  
This module generates a new progression based on:

* Root Note  
* Style  
* Scale (major/minor)  
* Total chords to generate  
* Variant (1st inversion / 2nd inversion / wide / widest)  
* Root Bass / Velocity limits

## ![][image6]	FLUXSequencer

![][image7]

* Up to 8 Steps Chord Sequence based on the current progression  
* Step Duration (1/128 \- 8/1)  
* Step Velocity (0 \- 127\)  
* Chords List   
* Current song time / tempo


Options

* Random velocities  
* Global step duration (1/128 \- 8/1)  
* Save Sequence (Pattern) to easy recall/switch  
* Floating song time/tempo and current ► next chord played (**FLUXTransport**)


## FLUXTransport

![][image8]  
Floating window with the following info:

* Current Chord played  
* Next Chord to be played  
* Current song transport time (bars/beats/ticks)  
* Current song tempo  
* List of the sequencer chords to be played

## 	FLUXArticulator (device)

![][image9]   ![][image10]

This module is a separate device that can be used in any track when FLUXProgressions is loaded. This gives you the possibility to articulate the current played chord with the following articulation:

- Arp Up  
- Arp Down  
- Arp Up/Down  
- Arp Random  
- Strum Up  
- Strum Down  
- Roll  
- Ping-Pong  
- Custom

The Custom mode plays the chord following the grid input.   
![][image11]  
The grid input is active only in Custom mode.

## FLUXSteps

![][image12]

## 

## Features

* Advanced step sequencer 


  * Up to 16 unique sequences with custom settings as:

    * Up to 64 steps

    * Loop points

    * Create clip from sequence

    * Time interval (1/64 to 2/1)

    * 5 different directions (up, down, up\&down, rotate, random)

    * Transpose

    * Scramble

    * Shift Left/Right

    * Undo last generation

    * View by Pitch, Velocity, Duration, Modulator 1, Modulator 2, All

    * Export/Import 

      

	

* ![][image13] BY CHORD module to generate sequence by:  
  ![][image14]

  * Chord: played or received by ChordsFlux

  * Density (%)

  * Steps (number of steps)

  * Repeat: control how many times a single sequence should be repeated before to change automatically (0 \= sequence never changes)

  * Velocity: velocity range of random velocities values generated

  * Pattern: Random, Up, Down, UpDown, Cycle

  * Octave (-3/+3)

  * Transpose (-36/+36)

    

* ![][image15] BY SCALE module to autogenerate sequence by:

  ![][image16]

  * Scale (32 available)

  * Root Note

  * Max notes 

  * Octave (-3/+3)

  * Density (%)

  * Note played 

  * Random Velocities

  * Random Duration (option)

  * Modulator 1 sequence (option)

  * Modulator 2 sequence (option)

  \*Auto generation can be disabled

    

* ![][image17] Recorder module

  ![][image18]

  * Record your sequence notes and velocity playing from your keyboard

  * Recording is automatically saved as the current sequence

    

* ![][image19] Performance module

  ![][image20]

  * Create a sequence performance (chain of up to 8 sequences defined by STEPS)

  * Sequence Repetition 

  * Sequence Transpose

    

* ![][image21] Modulators module

  ![][image22]

  * Left/Right Shifter based time interval or LFO frequency

  * Shifter LFO mapper: map the LFO to any device control

  * Velocity mapper: map the velocity value of each sequence step to any device control

  * Modulator 1 mapper: map the Modulator 1 of each sequence step to any device control

  * Modulator 2 mapper: map the Modulator 2 of each sequence step to any device control

		

---

## Description

**Modules**  
NovaFLUX is based on the following modules to manage your sequences:

- **By Chord:** autogenerative sequences based on chord input  
- **By Scale Module**: autogenerative sequences  
- **Recorder Module:** record your sequences using your MIDI input device  
- **Modulator Module**: LFO shifter and velocity, modulator 1 and modulator 2 sequences to modulate other devices controls with a simple mapping  
- **Performance Module**: create a sequences chain


  
Each module can be activated by the Modules Bar  
![][image23]

## What Can I Do ?

**Creation/Experimental Scenario**

* Generate sequences by playing chords as input and with control parameters about the generated sequence  
* Generate sequences by scale (32 available), root note, notes range, octave and density  
* Randomize velocities and duration (option)  
* Edit any sequence note, velocity, duration, modulator 1 and modulator 2  
* Optimize your creative workflow in order to generate unique sequences based on different parameters and controls to adapt them to your musical needs  
* Differentiate sequences by number of steps, loop points, time interval, direction and transpose  
* Add kinetic possibilities with sequence shift by an included LFO with custom time/frequency and left/right direction  
* Create clip from sequences to a target track  
* Easy switch between sequences and controls  
* Add your sync sequences data (mod 1 and mod 2\) as modulation sources to other instruments/devices

**Performance Sequences**  
Create a chain of up to 8 different sequences to play automatically with custom repetition and transpose control in order to setup a performance scenario

**Up to 16 sequences to use independently on any track**  
**FLUXSteps** is able to create/generate up to 16 unique sequences that can be used in any track.  
This means that you can play for example sequence 1 on track 2, sequence 12 on track 3, sequence 4 on track 4, etc. keeping all the sequences in one device, and using a remote sync device to select the sequence you want to play on that track. You can also customize the remote device controls like Time, Direction and Transpose to better adapt to your instrument or musical needs.  
Many instruments have their custom sequencer but with **FLUXSteps** you can centralize your sequences, manage, update, control in real time any sequence and use them on different instruments in order to optimize your workflow.

**Get the advantage of integration with FLUXProgressions**  
Used with **FLUXProgressions/FLUXSequencer** this device can generate custom sequences based on the chord currently played by FLUXSequencer. No extra settings. FLUXSteps automatically recognize incoming chords played by FLUXSequencer

## VarFLUX Live Variations Selector

Live Variations Selector

Person
